name: rtp-personal-skills
description: Ravi Teja Palanki's complete AI PM operating system — 66 skills across thinking, judgment, craft, research, writing, presentations, and system administration. Includes the AIPM orchestrator (54 skills in 3 layers across 5 plugins), plus 12 general-purpose skills for visualization, email, branding, research synthesis, and folder governance. Install this plugin to absorb RTP's entire Claude skill library on any machine.
